name: Preset API Skills
description: AI agent skills for explicit direct API workflows only. Do not use for MCP-only work.

skills.name: preset-api
skills.description: Authenticate with the Preset Management API for direct API workflows. Required by the other direct API skills. Do not use for MCP-only work.

skills.name: preset-workspaces
skills.description: List Preset teams and workspaces through direct API calls. Do not use for MCP-only work.

skills.name: preset-admin
skills.description: Manage Preset team memberships, workspace lifecycle, invites, role identifiers, and audit logs through direct API calls. Do not use for MCP-only work.

skills.name: preset-superset
skills.description: Discover workspace Superset version, OpenAPI, permissions, menu capabilities, and direct API safety classification. Do not use for MCP-only work.

skills.name: preset-dashboards
skills.description: Inspect dashboards, charts, tabs, screenshots, thumbnails, and chart data through direct Superset API calls. Do not use for MCP-only work.

skills.name: preset-datasets
skills.description: Inspect databases, schemas, tables, datasets, columns, metrics, and table metadata through direct Superset API calls. Do not use for MCP-only work.

skills.name: preset-database-connections
skills.description: Inspect or route database connection workflows through direct Superset API calls with credential-aware approval. Do not use for MCP-only work.

skills.name: preset-destructive-imports
skills.description: Review and route destructive or overwrite-capable direct API import workflows with explicit approval. Do not use for MCP-only work.

skills.name: preset-embedded-rls
skills.description: Review row-level security clauses for direct API embedded analytics and guest-token workflows. Do not use for MCP-only work.

skills.name: preset-sqllab
skills.description: Inspect SQL Lab bootstrap, query history, saved queries, and SQL execution through direct Superset API calls. Do not use for MCP-only work.

skills.name: preset-import-export
skills.description: Route direct Superset API import/export workflows with disclosure and mutation gates. Do not use for MCP-only work.

skills.name: preset-embedding
skills.description: Inspect embedded dashboard configuration and route guest-token/trusted-domain direct API workflows. Do not use for MCP-only work.

skills.name: preset-guest-tokens
skills.description: Create and route embedded dashboard guest-token workflows through direct Superset API calls. Do not use for MCP-only work.

skills.name: preset-roles-permissions
skills.description: Review and route role, workspace membership, permission, and access-control changes through direct API calls. Do not use for MCP-only work.

skills.name: preset-sql-execution
skills.description: Run or route SQL Lab execution, result retrieval, exports, query stop, saved-query mutations, and permalinks through direct Superset API calls. Do not use for MCP-only work.

skills.name: preset-snowflake-cortex
skills.description: Prepare Snowflake Cortex direct API account, authentication, role, warehouse, and safety context. Do not use for MCP-only work.

skills.name: preset-cortex-agents
skills.description: List, describe, create, update, delete, and run Snowflake Cortex Agents through direct API/SQL workflows. Do not use for MCP-only work.
